key_improvements.title: Formal Proof of Bound Composition Theorem with SMT Verification
critiques_addressed: Composition theorem—the central soundness claim—is implemented but not formally proved or mechanized
Composition Theorem Not Formally Stated in logic
key_improvements.approach: 1. State the theorem formally as a sequence of lemmas with explicit hypotheses in both Python and LaTeX. 2. Implement machine-verified proof via Z3: encode the theorem as QF_LRA assertions and verify each lemma step. 3. Add a formal_proof module with step-by-step validity proof that can be re-checked. 4. Add experiment: run the formal verifier on 100+ random decompositions and report verification rate.
deliverables: causalbound/composition/formal_proof.py — mechanized step-by-step proof via Z3
Experiment results showing 100% verification on valid decompositions

key_improvements.title: Formal Discretization Error Bounds with SMT Certificates
critiques_addressed: Discretization introduces unquantified approximation error that breaks the formal guarantee chain
Discretization breaks the clean symbolic framework
key_improvements.approach: 1. Add formal error analysis: for each discretization, compute the worst-case L1/TV/KL error bound analytically. 2. Encode discretization error bounds as QF_LRA constraints in the SMT verifier so the total pipeline bound accounts for discretization gap. 3. Add adaptive refinement that tightens discretization until error is below a user-specified threshold. 4. Prove that composed bounds remain valid after adding the discretization correction term.
deliverables: Experiment: error convergence as bins increase

key_improvements.title: DAG Sensitivity Analysis Across Markov Equivalence Class
critiques_addressed: Causal discovery (FCI) is unverified with no sensitivity analysis for DAG errors
No adversarial evaluation of the pipeline
key_improvements.approach: 1. Enumerate DAGs in the Markov equivalence class (MEC) of the discovered PAG. 2. Recompute causal polytope bounds under each DAG in the MEC. 3. Report bound variation (min/max/std across MEC). 4. Add adversarial DAG perturbation: flip/add/remove edges and measure bound sensitivity. 5. Produce a sensitivity report showing bound robustness.
deliverables: causalbound/scm/sensitivity.py — MEC enumeration and bound recomputation
Experiment: bound variation across MEC and under perturbation

secondary_improvements.title: Alethe-Format Proof Certificate Extraction
secondary_improvements.description: Extract Alethe-format proof objects from Z3 UNSAT verdicts to reduce TCB.

secondary_improvements.title: Contagion Model Property Verification
secondary_improvements.description: Add SMT-based property checking for contagion models (monotonicity, bounded output, Lipschitz).

phases.B1: Execute all 5 improvements with real code
phases.B2: Math rigor pass: verify all theorems, tighten bounds
phases.finalization: Rewrite paper, README, API.md, grounding.json, experiments, commit
